text: Earth revolves around the Sun once every approximately 365 days.
Water is a chemical compound composed of hydrogen and oxygen with formula H2O.
Paris is the capital city of France.
Python is a high-level programming language known for readability.
Evaporation is the process where liquid water changes into water vapor.
Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.
Photosynthesis is a process used by plants to convert light energy into chemical energy.
Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
